benefits.description: Reduced desire to drink alcohol despite not being an alcoholic; went from wine with dinner/social drinking to not caring about wine

side_effects.description: Sleep medication takes longer to kick in at higher doses (7.5mg-10mg); solved by taking sleep med 3 hours before bed
Constipation, especially at higher doses (7.5mg-10mg); managed with Miralax every other day to daily

protocol_notes: Titrated from lower doses up to 7.5mg then 10mg. Notes that at lower doses gastric emptying effects are minimal but become more pronounced at higher doses. Takes sleep medication 3 hours before bed as workaround for delayed absorption. Uses Miralax for constipation.
